message:
refactor(fleet): add fleet-dns feature flag and tighten discovery API visibility

- Add fleet-dns feature flag to Cargo.toml as a scaffold for future
  DNS-based fleet discovery (SRV/A record resolution).
- Change DiscoveryConfigFormat enum and parse_str() from pub to
  pub(crate) since they are implementation details not needed by
  external consumers.
- Remove Debug derive from ProviderRegistry since the trait object
  Vec<Box<dyn InventoryProvider>> doesn't implement Debug.
- Fix test assertion to use .err().expect() for clearer error messages
  instead of .unwrap_err().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,6 +63,7 @@ daemon = []         # Dormant monitoring mode
 ui = ["ratatui", "crossterm"]  # Premium TUI experience
 test-utils = []     # Export test utilities for integration tests
 test-tempdir = []   # Enable tempdir helper in test utilities
+fleet-dns = []      # Enable DNS-based fleet discovery (scaffold)
 
 [dev-dependencies]
 assert_cmd = "2"
